title: Dan'l Danehy-Oakes
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Dan'l Danehy-Oakes''' is a science-fiction writer who wrote "[[Shaara and the Sarlacc: The Skiff Guard's Tale]]" for the ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' anthology.

==''Star Wars'' works==
===Short Stories===
*{{StoryCite|story=Shaara and the Sarlacc: The Skiff Guard's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} (1996)
